model.label: Qwen 3 Max
model.description: Alibaba • Suitable for complex tasks, with the strongest capabilities.

pick.rationale: Florida holds a slight overall edge in advanced metrics, ranking 4th nationally compared to Illinois’s 6th–7th, and boasts a significantly stronger defense—5th in adjusted defensive efficiency versus Illinois’s 24th—which will be critical in containing the Illini’s top-ranked offense. While Illinois has elite offensive firepower, Florida’s two-way balance and SEC-tested defense provide a credible path to victory. Although Florida guard Alijah Martin missed recent games with a hip injury, there is no confirmed report he will be out for the Elite 8, and even if limited, the Gators’ depth and defensive discipline should carry them through.

reasoningStep.title: Elite 8 South Final: Florida vs. Illinois Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Florida is favored due to superior defensive metrics and overall balance, despite Illinois's elite offense; health status of key Gators player remains uncertain but not confirmed as a miss.
evidence: Florida ranks 4th nationally in both KenPom and Torvik; Illinois ranks 6th–7th.
Florida's defense ranks 5th (Torvik) and 91.8 adjD (KenPom); Illinois's defense ranks 24th and 99.1 adjD.
Illinois has the #1 offense per KenPom and #2 per Torvik; Florida's offense ranks 9th–11th.
Alijah Martin (Florida's second-leading scorer) missed late-season games with a hip pointer, but no confirmation he'll miss Elite 8.
No reported injuries for Illinois; team appears at full strength.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

Current game label: South Regional Final
Round: Elite 8
